---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new check, report, or cleanup behavior
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should the tool do?

## Scope

What paths, registry areas, services, or data sources are involved?

## Safety Rules

What must the tool avoid?

## DryRun Output

What should appear in the report before any cleanup is allowed?

## Execute Behavior

What should happen only after `-Execute` is used?
